## Checklist (author)

- [ ] Tests added/updated for every behavior change (`.claude/rules/testing.md`)
- [ ] Ran `/review` (code-reviewer agent) and resolved all blockers
- [ ] If connectors/profiling/auth touched: ran security-auditor agent
- [ ] DDL and ORM changed together, or neither
- [ ] New dependencies: license checked (no AGPL/SSPL), justified below
- [ ] No credentials, secrets, or raw customer samples in code, logs, or fixtures
